zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Leslie於1315年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾藍納可時，她的父親Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie36歲，母親Maria De Abernathy27歲。她於1335年之前與William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1350年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾比享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Leslie于1315年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾藍納可时，她的父亲Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie36岁，母亲Maria De Abernathy27岁。她于1335年之前与William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1350年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾艾比享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Leslie was born in 1315, in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, was 36 and her mother, Maria De Abernathy, was 27. She married William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk before 1335. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1350, in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Leslie est née en 1315, à Lanark, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maria De Abernathy, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk avant 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Abbey, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Leslie 1315 in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie 36 und ihre Mutter Maria De Abernathy 27. Sie hat vor 1335 William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Leslie è nata il nel 1315 nel Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Maria De Abernathy, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk prima del 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1350, nel Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Leslie(이)가 1315년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 랜아르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria De Abernathy(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1335년 이전 William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 애브브이에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk antes 1335. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Abbey, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Leslie родилась в 1315 г. в местности ланарк, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria De Abernathy, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Innes 7th of Innes - of that Ilk перед 1335 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности эбби, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.
